commercial_takeaway: RestoreAssist understands the restoration job lifecycle and removes after-hours paperwork without taking control away from the tradie.

scorecard.pass_standard: pain is specific and readable muted in the feed
language clearly belongs to water-damage/restoration work
at least three concrete product mechanisms are shown, not claimed
AI is framed as draft/confirm, not autonomous magic
physical-world detail breaks up the pure UI-render feel
cuts feel intentional and product frames remain readable
music/SFX/room tone support the voiceover without masking it
brand colours survive while the raw generated-render look is removed
thumbnail, captions, CTA, and muted playback are handled
no leaked customer data, unclear music, or recognisable unlicensed people

blocking_failures: music or stock footage without licensing evidence
first frame fails muted LinkedIn playback
